title: BDRY - December 6, 2022
summary: A quiet December for dry bulk freight? - Spot dry bulk rates have stabilized in the ~13,000 range for all asset classes Is the much-awaited "pivot" in China's strict Covid policy here? - Following the widely-publicized demonstrations Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions

children.title: Overview
children.summary:
- A quiet December for dry bulk freight? - Spot dry bulk rates have stabilized in the ~13,000 range for all asset classes
- Is the much-awaited "pivot" in China's strict Covid policy here?
